description: Researcher-side CLI for the YesWeHack bug bounty platform. Discover programs, read scope, draft and submit reports, browse hacktivity, track payouts.

tools.name: business_units_list
tools.description: List business units visible to the user. Returns the BusinessUnitList. (requires auth)

tools.name: events_list
tools.description: List YesWeHack events. Optional: page, itemsPerPage. Returns the EventListPage.

tools.name: hacktivity_by_hunter
tools.description: List a hunter's disclosed reports. Required: username. Optional: page, resultsPerPage. Returns the HacktivityListPage.

tools.name: hacktivity_list
tools.description: List recently disclosed reports across all public programs. Optional: page, resultsPerPage, programs (plus 1 more). Returns the HacktivityListPage.

tools.name: hunters_get
tools.description: Get a hunter's public profile (points, rank, impact, achievements). Required: username. Returns the Hunter.

tools.name: hunters_list_achievements
tools.description: List a hunter's earned achievement badges. Required: username. Returns the AchievementList.

tools.name: programs_get
tools.description: Get a program's full detail (rules, reward grid, scope counts, BU, etc.). Required: slug. Returns the Program.

tools.name: programs_list
tools.description: List bug bounty programs the user can see. Optional: page, itemsPerPage, disabled (plus 4 more). Returns the ProgramListPage.

params.name: disabled
params.description: Set to 0 to exclude disabled programs

tools.name: programs_list_scopes
tools.description: List the in-scope and out-of-scope assets for a program. Required: slug. Returns the ScopeList. (requires auth)

tools.name: ranking_list
tools.description: Top hunters by points. Optional: page, itemsPerPage. Returns the RankingPage.

tools.name: taxonomies_list_countries
tools.description: Country reference list (codes, names). Returns the CountryList.

tools.name: taxonomies_list_profile_url_types
tools.description: Allowed profile URL types (twitter, github, linkedin, etc.). Returns the ProfileUrlTypeList.

tools.name: taxonomies_list_vulnerable_parts
tools.description: List vulnerability parts (CWE-like taxonomy used when filing reports). Returns the VulnerablePartList. (requires auth)

tools.name: user_get_self
tools.description: Get the authenticated user. Returns the User. (requires auth)

tools.name: user_list_email_aliases
tools.description: List the authenticated user's email aliases (per-program forwarding addresses). Returns the EmailAliases. (requires auth)

tools.name: user_list_invitations
tools.description: List the authenticated user's program invitations. Returns the Invitations. (requires auth)

tools.name: user_list_reports
tools.description: List reports the authenticated user has submitted. Optional: page, itemsPerPage. Returns the ReportListPage. (requires auth)
